ratings.comment: Dr Holly is truly inspirational. She showcases important environmental concerns through case studies that will really stretch your world view.

Holly Gibbs is an amazing professor who's very passionate about her work and cares about the success of her students. Lectures are interesting and she gets students involved to make it more fun. There are plenty of small quizzes during class, but these and all other assignments are designed to help you do well. Overall, amazing class and professor!
